name: DHL Shipment Tracking
description: Track DHL shipments worldwide using the official DHL Unified Tracking API. Get real-time shipment status, delivery events, and estimated delivery dates.

tools.name: dhl_track_shipment
tools.description: Track a DHL shipment by its tracking number. Returns the current status, all tracking events, and estimated delivery time. Supports DHL Express, DHL Parcel, DHL eCommerce, DHL Freight, and other DHL business units.

trackingNumber.description: The DHL tracking number (e.g. 7777777770 for DHL Parcel DE, 1234567890 for DHL Express)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for event descriptions (e.g. 'en', 'de'). Defaults to 'en'.

tools.name: dhl_track_multiple_shipments
tools.description: Track multiple DHL shipments at once by providing a comma-separated list of tracking numbers. Returns status and events for all shipments. Maximum 20 tracking numbers per request.

trackingNumbers.description: Comma-separated list of DHL tracking numbers (max 20)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for event descriptions. Defaults to 'en'.
